hints.text: Extremely limited coverage: **Gen3 trekkers in Gombe NP** (+1 indoor tripod), tripods on **Kilimanjaro**, and car spill coverage on the Kenya border — nothing pinpointable or on roads → memorise the trekkers

**Kilimanjaro tripods**: high-altitude dark-grey rock, eternal snow in the distance, sometimes mountaineers & tents; tripod look = motion blur + saturated 'ethereal' colours (tripods exist in other countries too)
**Gombe NP walking trekker**: lowlands = dense dark jungle (sometimes **chimpanzees**); higher = open savanna-like trees; hilltops = bare grassland w/ views over Lake Tanganyika
**Lake Tanganyika boat trekker** hugging the coast (coast ALWAYS east): olive-green & white boat w/ pixelated people; forested hills w/ bare grassy tops
hints.uniq_note: Don't confuse with the Madagascar boat trekkers.

hints.text: One more tripod **inside Jane Goodall's house** (Gombe NP, next to the trekker coverage)
